properties.Title: Manus Memory Cleanup Procedure and Profile Enhancement

text.content: Executive Summary

rich_text.plain_text: Executive Summary

text.content: Yannick applies the proven GPT memory cleanup procedure to Manus Knowledge base, successfully reducing 51 accumulated entries to 16 distilled rules. The session focuses on systematically archiving, categorizing, eliminating duplicates, and distilling behavioral rules for optimal cognitive performance. Additionally, user profile enhancement was performed using data fusion from ChatGPT profile to maximize information density within character limits.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Yannick applies the proven GPT memory cleanup procedure to Manus Knowledge base, successfully reducing 51 accumulated entries to 16 distilled rules. The session focuses on systematically archiving, categorizing, eliminating duplicates, and distilling behavioral rules for optimal cognitive performance. Additionally, user profile enhancement was performed using data fusion from ChatGPT profile to maximize information density within character limits.


## Context & Intent

Improve Manus performance by cleaning up accumulated behavioral rules and knowledge entries that had become cluttered with duplicates, project-specific items, and overlapping directives. Apply systematic memory cleanup methodology while preserving essential cognitive behaviors.


## What Was Done

Complete audit of 51 Manus Knowledge entries, identification of 7 exact duplicates, 6 security rule overlaps, and 11 project-specific entries. Systematically distilled content into 12 permanent kernel rules and 4 project-specific rules. Created comprehensive backup in Notion and produced optimized user profile fields.


## Outputs Produced

- [archive] Manus Knowledge Backup - Pre-Reset — Complete Notion backup of all 51 original Knowledge entries organized by theme
- [ruleset] Distilled Kernel Rules — 16 optimized rules (12 permanent kernel + 4 project-specific) with titles and use conditions
- [configuration] Enhanced User Profile — Optimized Manus personalization fields fused with ChatGPT profile data

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Reduce 51 Knowledge entries to 16 distilled rules (-69% reduction)
- Separate permanent kernel (12 rules always enabled) from project-specific (4 rules disabled by default)
- Eliminate all duplicates and security rule overlaps through fusion
- Archive project-specific rules rather than deleting them completely

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Systematic 5-phase cleanup procedure (Archive → Map → Eliminate → Distill → Reset → Reinject)
- Backup-first approach prevented any data loss
- Clear categorization of kernel vs project-specific rules
Failed / suboptimal:

- No bulk import mechanism for Knowledge rules - had to inject one by one
- Manual deletion process for clearing existing Knowledge entries
Discoveries:

- Manus Knowledge has Enable/Disable toggles for selective activation
- Profile character limits: More about you (2000c), Custom Instructions (3000c)
- Memory cleanup principles apply equally to behavioral rules and factual memory

## Challenges & Blockers

- No programmatic API for bulk Knowledge management in Manus
- Manual deletion required for each existing Knowledge entry
- Character limits in profile fields requiring careful density optimization

## Open Questions

- How to automate future Knowledge maintenance procedures
- Optimal frequency for kernel rule reviews and updates
- Integration of kernel rules with broader Y-OS cognitive architecture

## Next Steps

- Transform 12 kernel rules into formal Y-OS cognitive kernel
- Establish quarterly memory maintenance schedule
- Test optimized profile effectiveness in production sessions
- Document Knowledge management procedures in Y-OS documentation
---
